Registry / Terms / maximum permissible error (of a measuring instrument)

maximum permissible error (of a measuring instrument)

VIMOutdated — VIM 1993 G 18 #02221 · 5 instances

Authoritative definition

VIM 1993 · concept #5.21view ↗

extreme values of an error permitted by specifications, regulations, etc. for a given measuring instrument

Outdated: Cites VIM 1993. Latest: VIM 2012.
  • VIM 1993 · #5.21
    extreme values of an error permitted by specifications, regulations, etc. for a given measuring instrument

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH ✗ This term is NOT in VIM 2012.
  2. MEDIUM 5 distinct definitions — harmonise.

Publication instances

5 distinct definitions across 5 publications.

extreme value of an error permitted by specifications, regulations, etc. for a given measuring instrument
